name: Dino Miner
author: Poki
description: Dino Miner is a mix of action and idle gameplay where you play as an adorable dinosaur with a mighty sword! Swing your blade to mine coins, unlock powerful drills to boost your earnings, and trade coins for gems and meat. Upgrade your gear, discover new areas, and take on fearsome monsters as you grow stronger. Ready to dig, slash, and explore your way to greatness? How to play Dino Miner? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Dino Miner? Dino Miner is created by monoinyo. Play their other games on Poki: Jigsaw Gems and Retro Rex ! How can I play Dino Miner for free? You can play Dino Miner for free on Poki. Can I play Dino Miner on mobile devices and desktop? Dino Miner can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
